title: Cookies&Cream Modpack LITE
description: Vanilla Minecraft - How it should be. Optimized, fast, beautiful.
body:
We all have had the experience where we are trying to make a Minecraft modpack for the latest version of the game, and just can't seem to do it! Some mods don't update, there are weird crashes for no reason, it just doesn't make sense! This modpack has all the performance enhancing mods and QoL mods you need! The work is all done for you. Simply install in the Modrinth app, and press install to update!

The modpack is in Beta so if you have any issues, please let me know!

The modpack also has config files preset to make the game run best in my opinion, but it hasn't been fully tested. It is designed for easy controls and no keybind conflicts. If you would like default settings to be adjusted just tell me!

Mods include performance enhancing mods like Sodium, shaders from Iris, QoL mods and tweaks, plus controller support for those coming from consoles!
